description_long: This is a stylized humanoid doll with long, straight pink hair that extends well past the waist and is styled with two round hair buns on top, each adorned with a white and pink bear-ear accessory. The doll has a pale complexion and wears a black bandeau top paired with high-waisted, light pink shorts featuring decorative buttons and cutouts. Black thigh-high stockings with pink bows and tall, platform lace-up boots in black and pink complete the outfit. The face is detailed with large, dark sunglasses and a small, neutral mouth, giving the doll a fashionable, urban look. The arms are extended outward, and the overall design is sleek and modern, with a playful, anime-inspired aesthetic.
description: A fashionable humanoid doll with long pink hair, bear-ear accessories, black sunglasses, and a trendy black and pink outfit with platform boots.
description_view_0: The back view highlights the long, straight pink hair, the bear-ear hair accessories, and the black platform boots.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the profile of the doll's face, the length and flow of the hair, and the layered look of the outfit and boots.
description_view_2: The front view displays the doll's facial features, sunglasses, bear-ear accessories, bandeau top, shorts, stockings with bows, and platform boots.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the hair's volume, the side profile of the face, and the outfit's silhouette.
attribute_clothing_style: Trendy urban streetwear with a black bandeau top, high-waisted light pink shorts with decorative buttons and cutouts, black thigh-high stockings with pink bows, and tall black and pink platform lace-up boots. The look is accessorized with large black sunglasses and bear-ear hair accessories, drawing influence from Harajuku and Kawaii fashion.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended outward horizontally, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso erect. The pose is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with a small closed mouth and large eyes obscured by oversized black sunglasses, giving no visible emotional cues.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight pink hair with two round buns on top, each decorated with a white and pink bear-ear accessory, and the rest of the hair flowing down the back.
